diffeomorphism.def: A continuously differentiable map $f: N \to M$ between two manifolds, such that $f^{-1}: M \to N$ is also differentiable. If $f$ is $r$-times differentiable it is called a $C^r$-diffeomorphism.

hyper surfaces.def: Coming from the analogy of a surface in 3D space is a 2D object. An geometric object that lives in a $n$–dimensional space, though itself is a $n-1$–dimensinal object.

Hamiltonian.def: The total energy function of a system, encoding kinetic and potential energy. ai-generated!

Lyapunov exponent.def: Average rate of divergence of nearby trajectories. Positive values indicate chaos. ai-generated!

Poincaré section.def: Intersections of a trajectory with a chosen hyperplane in phase space. ai-generated!

phase space.def: The space of all possible states, with axes for each position and momentum coordinate. ai-generated!

Hénon-Heiles potential.def: Two-dimensional potential modelling chaotic motion: V = ½(x²+y²) + x²y − ⅓y³. ai-generated!
